name: chart-kpi-01
title: KPI Tile - Up
description: A KPI stat tile: a large value, a positive trend delta and an area sparkline underneath. Use as a dashboard headline metric.

files.content:
import { Area, AreaChart } from "recharts" import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle, } from "@/components/ui/card" import { ChartContainer, type ChartConfig } from "@/components/ui/chart" const chartData = [ { month: 1, value: 3200 }, { month: 2, value: 3600 }, { month: 3, value: 3400 }, { month: 4, value: 4100 }, { month: 5, value: 4400 }, { month: 6, value: 5200 }, ] const chartConfig = { value: { label: "Revenue", color: "var(--chart-1)" }, } satisfies ChartConfig export default function ChartKpi01() { return ( Revenue $45,231.89

↑ 20.1%{" "} vs last month

) }
